title: Delicate Stew
description: A comforting and tender stew made with delicate American beef, perfect for a cozy evening. This gluten-free stew is a twist on a classic recipe.
instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of oil and brown the beef on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the browned beef from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion, carrot, and celery to the pot and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the gluten-free flour to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Gradually stir in the beef broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Return the beef to the pot and add the prune, salt, and pepper.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
